news.t: Franklin Templeton Launches Templeton Emerging Markets Debt ETF (TEMD)

overview.description: The Templeton Emerging Markets Debt ETF (TEMD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking interest income and capital appreciation through investments in government-related debts from the emerging markets. The fund aims to capture opportunities across global interest rates, sovereign credit, and currencies. TEMD was launched on Jan 20, 2026 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Launches Templeton Emerging Markets Debt ETF (TEMD)
data.text: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Franklin Templeton, a global investment leader, today announced the launch of the Templeton Emerging Markets Debt ETF (NYSE Arca: TEMD), an actively managed exchang...
